docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $700.00 FILED BY WOLINSKI, WOJCIECH AS TO DEFENDANT YOAS, DAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-2016 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-25-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-28-2016 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-25-2016 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $65.00 SERVED MAY-11-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT YOAS, DAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-25-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-25-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-25-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOLINSKI, WOJCIECH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOAS, DAN $700.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $810.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
